what-happened-to-medal-of-honor.excerpt: From DreamWorks and Spielberg through EA LA and Danger Close, why Warfighter shelved the series, what VR’s Above and Beyond signals, and where the back catalogue is playable today.

what-happened-to-crackdown.excerpt: From Crackdown 1’s Halo 3 beta tailwind and co-op sandbox to Crackdown 2’s freak outbreak, Crackdown 3’s cloud-destruction pivot—and whether Microsoft might revisit the series.

the-heroes-of-halo-wars.excerpt: Companion notes to the video: Red Team’s role and lore, Forge’s arc and sacrifice, Anders and Cutter, Serena’s six years alone and rampancy—and why the Spirit of Fire crew stops a Covenant Forerunner gambit decades before Halo CE.

sniper-elite-resistance-first-impression.excerpt: Notes from the first campaign mission on PC (medium): third-person pacing, subsonic ammo, traversal, traps, Fleck cannons, dam objectives, and classic Sniper Elite kill-cam feedback.

img.alt: Command & Conquer — C&C Online launcher setup guide

trophies-are-better-than-achievements.excerpt: PlayStation trophies versus Xbox achievements: tiers, Platinums, DLC lists, profile levels — and why raw Gamerscore often fails to tell a story.

img.alt: Comparison of PlayStation trophies and Xbox achievements

what-made-rollercoaster-tycoon-so-much-f.excerpt: My love letter to the classic RollerCoaster Tycoon line: late-90s PC success, Chris Sawyer’s one-developer craft, OpenRCT2 and RCT3, and why sandbox plus management still resonates with me.

call-of-duty-roads-to-victory-psp-gamepl.excerpt: The video treats Call of Duty: Roads to Victory as a curiosity: a World War II–era CoD built for the PSP when the brand was still strongly associated with WWII, months before the franchise’s modern pivot with Call of Duty 4.

halo-wars-the-ultimate-design-for-consol.excerpt: How Ensemble Studios designed Halo Wars around a controller-only platform — unit selection, locked base slots, and maps built for fixed bases — and why that blueprint still defines console RTS.

what-happened-to-army-of-two.excerpt: Co-op, aggro, three releases in five years, preservation headaches on modern Xbox, and why a remaster might be the path back.

ashes-of-the-singularity-2-demo-impressi.excerpt: First impressions of the Ashes of the Singularity 2 demo — a large-scale RTS that blends Command & Conquer, Company of Heroes, and Halo Wars.

halo-infinite-walkthrough.excerpt: Andy and Gus tackle the full Halo Infinite campaign on Legendary in co-op — completing the Storehaus run through mainline Halo (except Halo 5), ~8.5 hours, linear missions plus Zeta Halo sandbox, and mixed verdicts on campaign vs. open world.
